## ❌ NEVER PROPOSE (hard rejections)

These proposal types are permanently rejected. Proposing them again wastes a swarm slot.

- API gateway / microservices — monolith works (Session 23, 25)

- ORM (SQLAlchemy, Prisma) — Supabase SDK only (Session 25)
- Privacy by default (hidden scores) — public by default chosen by CEO (Session 25)
- OpenAI as primary LLM — Gemini is primary, cost decision (Session 25)
- Single-word keywords in questions — proven gameable (Session 42)
- Self-assessment as evidence — circular by definition (Mistake #47, Session 42)
